hero.heading: Quiet hands. Calm hours.
hero.subheading: A neighborhood nail studio in Laguna Hills. Gel manicures, dipping powder, and full pedicures in a clean, unhurried room.

about.heading: A studio, not a salon.
paragraphs: U Nails opened in 2017 with a simple idea: nail care should feel like an hour off, not a transaction. Soft music. Real conversation. No TV.
Our technicians have an average of eleven years of experience. Every implement is sealed-pack autoclaved between guests. Our gel and acrylic lines are HEMA-free and 9-free.
Same-day appointments most days — call ahead or walk in. Closed Sundays so our team can rest.

services.title: Signature Manicure
services.description: A 45-minute soak, shape, cuticle care, and finish in your choice of regular polish or strengthening base. Includes hand massage.

services.title: Gel Manicure
services.description: Long-wear gel with chip-free finish lasting up to three weeks. Brands include OPI, CND Shellac, and Apres.

services.title: Dipping Powder
services.description: Lightweight, no-UV alternative to gel. Stronger than polish, gentler than acrylic. 30-color palette to choose from.

services.title: Spa Pedicure
services.description: 60 minutes. Warm soak with eucalyptus, full callus care, exfoliating scrub, hot stone massage, and finish.

services.title: Acrylic Full Set
services.description: Hand-sculpted acrylic extensions in your choice of length and shape. French, ombré, gel polish or matte top coat.

services.title: Nail Art
services.description: From subtle French tips to detailed hand-painted designs and chrome work. Pricing varies by design — call for a quote.

reviews.name: Jennifer P.
reviews.text: Best nail experience in Laguna Hills. They actually listen, don't rush you, and the gel mani lasted 22 days without lifting.

reviews.name: Adrienne L.
reviews.text: My pedicure tech took her time with my callus issue — first salon to actually fix it. I drive 25 minutes to come here now.

reviews.name: Brooke W.
reviews.text: Spotlessly clean, calm environment, no aggressive small talk. The dipping powder is gorgeous and lasts three weeks easily.

contact.address: 23028 Lake Forest Dr suite b, Laguna Hills, CA 92653

seo.title: U Nails & Spa — Laguna Hills nail salon
seo.description: Calm, clean nail studio in Laguna Hills. Gel, dip, acrylics, pedicures. Open 6 days a week — closed Sundays.
